description: Full prompts for Superdesign animation templates

prompts.title: Hyper-Speed Loading State
prompts.description: Loading animation UI featuring a character-like loader with animated lines, a body made from geometric shapes, and moving horizontal lines across the background.
prompts.prompt: Loading animation with geometric shapes, synchronized motion effects including rotation, translation, and opacity fades.

prompts.title: Force Field Background
prompts.description: An interactive, particle-based force field background effect that reacts to mouse movement.
prompts.prompt: Uses p5.js to render particles based on image brightness maps, creating a fluid, magnetic visual experience.

prompts.title: Gooey Gradient Background
prompts.description: A mesmerizing, interactive gooey liquid gradient background with animated blobs and mouse-following effect.
prompts.prompt: Interactive liquid blobs with blur effects, perfect for immersive landing pages.

prompts.title: Tubes Interactive Background
prompts.description: A high-performance interactive 3D background featuring neon tubes that follow the cursor.
prompts.prompt: Based on threejs-components, includes click interaction to randomize colors and hero section overlay.

prompts.title: Parallax Stars Background
prompts.description: A mesmerizing space-themed background with animated parallax pixel stars and radial gradient atmosphere.
prompts.prompt: Features three layers of stars moving at different speeds to create depth.

prompts.title: Pastel Gradient Background
prompts.description: A soft, rotating pastel gradient background with blur effects and smooth animation.

prompts.title: Jelly Squish Button
prompts.description: A high-fidelity interactive 3D jelly simulation that responds to vertical dragging and mouse movement.
prompts.prompt: Uses GSAP for physics-based animation and optimized image sequencing.

prompts.title: Squares Background
prompts.description: An animated grid of squares background with directional movement and hover interactions.
prompts.prompt: Customizable speed, direction, and colors with radial vignette effect.

prompts.title: Letter Glitch Background
prompts.description: A high-end, minimalist letter glitch background effect with customizable speed, vignettes, and smooth transitions.

prompts.title: Ballpit Background
prompts.description: A high-performance 3D physics-based background effect with interactive bouncing spheres.
prompts.prompt: Features custom shader for scattering effects, Three.js instanced rendering for performance.

prompts.title: Grid Distortion Background
prompts.description: A high-performance WebGL-based grid distortion effect for background images.

prompts.title: Interactive Waves Background
prompts.description: An interactive, wavy background effect using Perlin noise and canvas.
prompts.prompt: Responds to mouse movement with fluid physics.

prompts.title: Hyperspeed Background
prompts.description: A high-performance, Three.js-based warp speed/hyperspeed background effect.
prompts.prompt: Customizable distortions, colors, and motion parameters. Supports multiple presets.

prompts.title: Faulty Terminal Background
prompts.description: A CRT/Terminal-style background with glitch effects, scanlines, and digital noise.
prompts.prompt: Highly interactive with mouse movements and page load animations.

prompts.title: Prismatic Burst Background
prompts.description: A high-performance WebGL prismatic burst background effect.
prompts.prompt: Built with OGL, customizable ray patterns, 3D animations, and dynamic color gradients.

prompts.title: Lightning Background
prompts.description: A high-performance WebGL-powered lightning/electric discharge background effect.
prompts.prompt: Features adjustable hue, intensity, speed, and scale. Built with GLSL shaders.

prompts.title: Plasma Background
prompts.description: A mesmerizing, high-performance plasma background effect using OGL.
prompts.prompt: Customizable color, speed, and mouse interaction.
